title: [Origin Realms] Darker Goth
description: Changes the texture for Gothic Tools, making them darker, gothier goth tools for Origin Realms Server
body:
This Resource pack is meant to be used in [Origin Realms](https://originrealms.com) Server

**Origin Realms DARKER GOTH Tools Resource Pack**

Do you think gothic tools in origin realms are not gothic enough? this pack makes goth tools darker with subtle purple details and add tones of white, making it look a lot more obscure, i mean, thats why it is gothier goth tools
FULLY COMPATIBLE WITH [OR SPIRIT SKINS]([https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/originrealms-spiritskins/](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/originrealms-spiritskins/))
